templateA.name: First Touch
templateA.template:
Hi {{firstName}}, this is Maria from Carson Cars about your {{make}} loan, account #{{stockNbr}}. Just reply and I'll help you out, or pay at Pay.CarsonCars.Net/{{stockNbr}}.
Reply STOP to opt out.
templateA.templateNoMake:
Hi {{firstName}}, this is Maria from Carson Cars about your loan, account #{{stockNbr}}. Just reply and I'll help you out, or pay at Pay.CarsonCars.Net/{{stockNbr}}.
Reply STOP to opt out.

templateB.name: Follow-up
templateB.description: 7+ days after Template A, no reply, no payment
templateB.template:
Hi {{firstName}}, Maria at Carson Cars again — still haven't heard back on your {{make}} loan, account #{{stockNbr}}. Reply here, call (425) 697-6969, or pay at Pay.CarsonCars.Net/{{stockNbr}}.
Reply STOP to opt out.
templateB.templateNoMake:
Hi {{firstName}}, Maria at Carson Cars again — still haven't heard back on your loan, account #{{stockNbr}}. Reply here, call (425) 697-6969, or pay at Pay.CarsonCars.Net/{{stockNbr}}.
Reply STOP to opt out.

templateD.name: Broken Promise
templateD.description: Sent when a payment commitment passes promised_date + 1 business day without payment
templateD.template:
Hi {{firstName}}, Maria at Carson Cars — looks like the payment you mentioned for {{PromisedDate}} on account #{{stockNbr}} hasn't hit yet. Everything ok? Reply here or pay at Pay.CarsonCars.Net/{{stockNbr}}.
Reply STOP to opt out.
templateD.templateNoMake:
Hi {{firstName}}, Maria at Carson Cars — looks like the payment you mentioned for {{PromisedDate}} on account #{{stockNbr}} hasn't hit yet. Everything ok? Reply here or pay at Pay.CarsonCars.Net/{{stockNbr}}.
Reply STOP to opt out.

holdingReply.name: Holding Reply
holdingReply.description: Auto-sent if no human reviews draft within 15 minutes
holdingReply.template: Hi {{firstName}}, this is Maria at Carson Cars — I got your message and someone from our team will respond shortly.

optOutConfirmation.name: Opt-Out Confirmation
optOutConfirmation.template: You've been opted out of Carson Cars text messages. If you need help with your account, call us at (425) 697-6969.
